strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_BLASTKNUCKLES_DESC: As Loader, kill a teleporter boss in a single punch.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_COFFEEBAG_DESC: +%150 hareket hızına ve saldırı hızına ulaş.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_COMPOSITEINJECTOR_DESC: Pick up 15 different types of Equipment.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CRYPTICSOURCE_DESC: As Mercenary, complete 3 Ethereal teleporters in one run.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_HOTTESTSAUCE_DESC: Bir Kjaro'nun Bandı, Benzin ve Ateş topu'nu aynı anda taşı.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_HUNTERSSIGIL_DESC: Tek bir kritik vuruşla 1.000 veya daha fazla hasar verin.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_INSECTICIDE_DESC: As REX, kill an Elite Beetle Queen.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_FIELDACCELERATOR_DESC: As Artificer, kill the Teleporter boss with a Nano-Bomb from 100m away.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_STICKYOVERLOADER_DESC: As MUL-T, collect 20 green items in a single run.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_STRANGECAN_DESC: Tek bir düşmana aynı anda 6 düşürücü uygulayın.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_TOYSOLDIERS_DESC: As Captain, recruit 15 minions at one time.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_UNIVERSALCHARGER_DESC: As Engineer, kill 400 enemies with your turrets.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_URANIUMHORSESHOE_DESC: As Bandit, complete stage 3 in less than 15 minutes on Typhoon difficulty.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_WEATHERRADIO_DESC: As Commando, kill a Stormborn boss on Monsoon difficulty.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_X4_DESC: As Huntress, kill 7 unique bosses in one run.
